Solutions

Websites built for the way your industry actually sells

A law firm and a roofing company are not the same business, and they should not get the same website. Below are eight industries, each with a live design preview you can look at right now.

Start a project Browse color schemes
Attorneys & Law Firms Construction & Contracting Medical & Dental Home Services & Trades Real Estate & Property Restaurants & Hospitality Accounting & Professional Services Fitness & Wellness

Trial Attorneys

When the stakes are highest, preparation wins

Four decades of courtroom results for businesses and families across the state.

Free consultation Case results
40+Years$180MRecovered98%Client rating
Personal InjurySerious injury and wrongful death claims.
Business LitigationContract, partnership, and fiduciary disputes.
Estate PlanningWills, trusts, and succession strategy.

Scheme: Counsel Navy & Brass

Attorneys & Law Firms

Authority in the first three seconds

Prospects arrive anxious and comparison-shopping. The site's job is to look established, name the practice area they searched for, and make contact a single tap.

  • Practice-area landing pages that rank
  • Case results and credentials up front
  • Click-to-call and intake forms that route
  • Bar-compliant disclaimers handled
Talk about a law firm site

WE BUILD WHAT HOLDS

Ground-up commercial, industrial retrofit, and design-build delivery since 1994.

Request a bid See projects
310Projects1.2MSq. ft.0Lost-time
Design-BuildOne contract from drawing to keys.
IndustrialPlants, warehouses, and heavy retrofit.
PreconstructionBudgets you can actually hold to.

Scheme: Safety Orange & Steel

Construction & Contracting

Built to win the bid

Buyers are checking whether you can handle their scale. Big project photography, hard numbers, safety record, and a bid request that takes thirty seconds.

  • Project portfolio with scope and square footage
  • Safety and certification credibility
  • Bid-request and subcontractor intake
  • Careers page that actually fills roles
Talk about a contractor site

Northbay Dental ServicesNew PatientsInsuranceBook Book online
Family & Cosmetic Dentistry

Dentistry that doesn't feel like a dentist

Same-week appointments, transparent pricing, and a team that explains everything first.

Book online New patients
2 daysAvg. wait
PreventiveCleanings, sealants, and early detection.
CosmeticVeneers, whitening, and alignment.
EmergencySame-day relief when it can't wait.

Scheme: Clinical Blue & Mint

Medical & Dental

Booked before they close the tab

Patients decide on availability, insurance, and nerves. Surface all three immediately and connect the booking button to the system you already run.

  • Online scheduling integration
  • Insurance and pricing transparency
  • New-patient forms before the visit
  • Reviews surfaced where they matter
Talk about a dental practice site

CARDINAL HeatingCoolingPlumbingEmergency Call now
24/7 Home Services

SOMEONE IS ALREADY ON THE WAY

HVAC, plumbing, and electrical. Live dispatch, flat-rate pricing, no overtime charges.

Call now Book a window
47mAvg. arrival24/7Dispatch10yrWarranty
Heating & CoolingRepair, replace, and maintain.
PlumbingLeaks, water heaters, and repipes.
ElectricalPanels, EV chargers, and rewiring.

Scheme: Midnight & Amber

Home Services & Trades

The call happens on mobile, now

HVAC, plumbing, electrical, roofing — almost every visit is an urgent mobile search. Speed, a sticky call button, and service-area pages win the job.

  • Sub-second mobile load
  • Sticky click-to-call on every screen
  • Service-area pages for local search
  • Emergency vs. scheduled paths split
Talk about a home services site

Scheme: Sage & Terracotta

Real Estate & Property

Let the photography do the selling

A restrained, editorial layout that gets out of the way of listing photos and film, with valuation capture as the primary conversion.

  • IDX / listing feed integration
  • Neighborhood guides for organic search
  • Valuation and seller lead capture
  • Agent profiles that build trust

800Labels6Courses'19Opened

Scheme: Burgundy & Cream

Restaurants & Hospitality

Menu, hours, table — nothing else

Ninety percent of visitors want one of three things. Everything else is decoration, and decoration that slows the page costs covers.

  • Reservation platform integration
  • Menus as real text, not PDFs
  • Private events and buyout inquiry
  • Local and map listings kept in sync

Accounting & Professional Services

Credibility, then a calendar link

Long consideration cycles reward substance. Publish real expertise, gate almost nothing, and make booking the advisor frictionless.

  • Service and industry landing pages
  • Insight library that compounds in search
  • Calendar booking and client portal links
  • Structured data for firm and people

Scheme: Charcoal & Lime

Fitness & Wellness

Free week, one tap away

Momentum sells memberships. Show the schedule, show the coaches, and make the trial offer impossible to miss on a phone.

  • Live class schedule embed
  • Trial and membership signup flows
  • Coach bios and transformation proof
  • Retention email and SMS hooks

How it works

Four steps, no mystery

Same process whether you're a two-attorney firm or a regional contractor — the difference is what we build, not how we get there.

01

Positioning

Who you're for, what you're best at, and the one action the site exists to produce.

02

Design system

A palette, type scale, and components — chosen for your industry, not a template.

03

Build & integrate

Fast static or dynamic build wired to booking, CRM, and the tools you already run.

04

Launch & measure

Analytics, search setup, and a plan for the pages that will earn traffic next.

Tell me your industry

Send a note with what you do and who you sell to. You'll get an honest read on what your site should be doing differently — and a fixed number to do it.

Start a project Email me
